<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Update an event stream for a project."}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/projects/{project_id}/eventstreams/{event_stream_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

Update an event stream for a project.
